channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Zawadi Yamungu's Sama Nominations Highlight Indigenous Music's Role in Modern South African Culture
item.description: Zawadi Yamungu, an emerging musician, has received her first Sama nomination for Best African Adult Contemporary Album and three Basadi in Music Awards nominations. The recognition underscores the gro...

item.title: Charlene Holt: A 1960s Hollywood Icon's Enduring Legacy
item.description: Charlene Holt (1928–1996) was an American actress and model celebrated for her elegance and presence in 1960s Hollywood. Born Verna Charlene Stavely in Snyder, Texas, she launched her career as a mode...

item.title: Raiders' Victory Overshadowed by Star's Season-Ending Injury
item.description: The Canberra Raiders secured a hard-fought victory against South Sydney, but the triumph was overshadowed by a devastating season-ending injury to star player Hudson Young. Young suffered an Achilles ...

item.title: Edmonton Elks Secure 19-17 Victory Over B.C. Lions in CFL Matchup
item.description: Vincent Blanchard's four field goals propelled the Edmonton Elks to a 19-17 victory over the B.C. Lions, marking a crucial win in their CFL season. The Elks, who haven't reached the playoffs since 201...

item.title: Spain Adjusts Tactics to Counter Messi in World Cup Final
item.description: Luis de la Fuente, Spain’s coach, revealed the team plans to give Lionel Messi ‘special attention’ in Sunday’s World Cup final against Argentina but will avoid man-marking him. De la Fuente shared a s...

item.title: UK Politicians Face Corruption Allegations in Major Scandal
item.description: A major political scandal has emerged involving several UK politicians, with allegations of corruption and unethical practices under investigation. The controversy centers around financial misconduct,...

item.title: Senator Hontiveros urges Malacañang to address China's AI-generated racist propaganda
item.description: Senator Risa Hontiveros has called on the Philippine government to summon the Chinese ambassador in response to an AI-generated video by a Chinese state-run media outlet that depicts Filipinos as monk...

item.title: Telstra executives to face parliamentary inquiry over nationwide outage affecting emergency services
item.description: Telstra chief executive Vicki Brady and other senior executives are scheduled to appear before a parliamentary inquiry in Canberra following the significant nationwide network outage that occurred ear...

item.title: Pensioner Reunites with R2,000 Lost at ATM After Family's Efforts
item.description: A heartwarming story unfolded in Elsies River as a family found R2,000 left behind at an ATM and successfully reunited it with its rightful owner, pensioner Ron Sabor. The incident began when the fami...

item.title: Ateneo's Alejos and Salarzon Compete in SEA V Cup for Alas Pilipinas
item.description: The article highlights the participation of Ateneo de Manila University's volleyball players, Rodge Alejos and Jian Salarzon, in the SEA V Cup with the Alas Pilipinas Men's team. The piece emphasizes ...

item.title: Lars Ulrich Reflects on U2's Sphere Show Inspiration for Metallica's Las Vegas Residency
item.description: Lars Ulrich, drummer of Metallica, has shared his admiration for U2’s groundbreaking performance at the Las Vegas Sphere, which inspired the band to embark on their own residency at the venue. Speakin...

item.title: NCP chief Sharad Pawar condemns Centre's handling of Wangchuk's protest and demands student grievances addressed
item.description: NCP (SP) president Sharad Pawar has strongly criticised the Central government for its 'irresponsible' handling of activist Sonam Wangchuk's hunger strike, accusing authorities of being a bystander to...

item.title: President's Website Hacked, Cybercriminals Demand Ransom
item.description: Cybercriminals hacked the official website of Kenyan President William Ruto on Saturday, July 18, 2026, replacing the homepage with a ransom demand. The attackers embedded a live cryptocurrency wallet...

item.title: NEMA coordinates repatriation of 1,516 Nigerians from South Africa
item.description: The National Emergency Management Agency (NEMA) has successfully coordinated the reception of 1,516 Nigerians who voluntarily returned from South Africa. The repatriation, which took place between Jun...

item.title: Mixx World Cup Campaign Benefits 80 Winners
item.description: The article highlights how the Mixx World Cup campaign has positively impacted 80 individuals by providing them with various benefits. While the exact nature of these benefits isn't detailed in the pr...

item.title: CJP leader begins hunger strike over protest site removal and demands PM resignation
item.description: Abhijeet Dipke, founder of the Cockroach Janta Party, has begun an indefinite hunger strike after activist Sonam Wangchuk was removed from the Jantar Mantar protest site. The decision was announced on...

item.title: Government Clarifies There Is No Open NYOTA Phase Two Business Support Application
item.description: The Kenyan government has cautioned members of the public against a fake online advert claiming that applications for Phase Two of the National Youth Opportunities Towards Advancement (NYOTA) Project ...

item.title: Opposition Leaders Arrive in Taita Taveta Amid Public Concerns Over Plane Travel
item.description: Babu Owino and James Orengo arrived in Taita Taveta on Saturday via a private plane for the Linda Mwananchi rally, sparking mixed reactions. The video of their arrival on a remote airstrip went viral,...

item.title: Israel's ambassador criticizes backlash over Calgary Stampede photo involving Naheed Nenshi
item.description: Israel's ambassador to Canada, Iddo Moed, criticized what he described as hatred entering a space meant for hospitality after Alberta NDP Leader Naheed Nenshi apologized for appearing in a photo with ...

item.title: Global Uncertainty and Market Volatility: China's Economy, Middle East Conflict, and SpaceX's Stock Decline
item.description: Australian investors faced heightened uncertainty as global events shaped market dynamics. A slowing Chinese economy, with GDP growth easing to 4.3% in the latest quarter, raised concerns for Australi...
